message:
feat(doctor): add failure detail resolution and staging helpers to e2e scripts and tests

Enhance the doctor full-stack reference project e2e infrastructure with
failure detail resolution, staging directory management, and richer
test coverage.

Scripts:
- test_doctor_full_stack_reference_projects_e2e.sh: Add
  resolved_stage_failure_class() and resolved_stage_repro_command()
  shell functions that prefer summary-level failure details when present,
  falling back to stage-level classification. Add stage_attempt_passes()
  check combining exit code, summary status, and failure class.
  Add per-stage failure detail emission in the summary JSON output.

- test_doctor_orchestration_state_machine_e2e.sh: Add staging directory
  lifecycle management (create unique temp dir, cleanup on exit). Add
  artifact directory resolution helper. Integrate staging root into
  the orchestration state machine for artifact collection.

Tests (doctor_full_stack_reference_project_matrix.rs):
- Add unique_test_temp_dir() and single_artifact_dir() test helpers
  for staging directory management
- Add resolved_stage_failure_class(), resolved_stage_repro_command(),
  and stage_attempt_passes() Rust equivalents matching shell behavior
- Add test script_preserves_stage_summary_failure_details verifying
  the shell functions are present in the script source

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -160,6 +160,35 @@ classify_failure() {
     esac
 }
 
+resolved_stage_failure_class() {
+    local stage_id="$1"
+    local exit_code="$2"
+    local summary_failure_class="$3"
+
+    if [[ "${exit_code}" -eq 124 ]]; then
+        printf '%s\n' "timeout"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    if [[ -n "${summary_failure_class}" && "${summary_failure_class}" != "none" && "${summary_failure_class}" != "missing" && "${summary_failure_class}" != "null" ]]; then
+        printf '%s\n' "${summary_failure_class}"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    classify_failure "${stage_id}" "${exit_code}"
+}
+
+resolved_stage_repro_command() {
+    local stage_repro_command="$1"
+    local summary_repro_command="$2"
+
+    if [[ -n "${summary_repro_command}" && "${summary_repro_command}" != "null" ]]; then
+        printf '%s\n' "${summary_repro_command}"
+    else
+        printf '%s\n' "${stage_repro_command}"
+    fi
+}
+
 derive_profile_seed() {
     local profile_id="$1"
     printf '%s:%s\n' "${BASE_SEED}" "${profile_id}"
@@ -182,6 +211,9 @@ run_stage_script() {
     local exit_code=1
     local summary_path=""
     local summary_status="missing"
+    local summary_failure_class="missing"
+    local summary_repro_command=""
+    local stage_repro_command="DOCTOR_FULLSTACK_SINGLE_RUN=1 TEST_SEED=${profile_seed} RCH_BIN=${RCH_BIN} bash ${PROJECT_ROOT}/${script_rel}"
 
     for ((attempt = 1; attempt <= RUN_RETRIES; attempt++)); do
         : > "${attempt_log}"
@@ -205,11 +237,20 @@ run_stage_script() {
         )"
         if [[ -n "${summary_path}" && -f "${summary_path}" ]]; then
             summary_status="$(jq -r '.status // "missing"' "${summary_path}" 2>/dev/null || echo "missing")"
+            summary_failure_class="$(jq -r '.failure_class // "missing"' "${summary_path}" 2>/dev/null || echo "missing")"
+            summary_repro_command="$(jq -r '.repro_command // empty' "${summary_path}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
         else
             summary_status="missing"
+            summary_failure_class="missing"
+            summary_repro_command=""
+        fi
+
+        if [[ "${exit_code}" -eq 0 && ( "${summary_status}" != "passed" || "${summary_failure_class}" != "none" ) ]]; then
+            echo "  WARN: ${run_label}/${stage_id} attempt ${attempt}/${RUN_RETRIES} exited 0 but summary reported status=${summary_status} failure_class=${summary_failure_class}; rejecting attempt"
+            exit_code=86
         fi
 
-        if [[ "${exit_code}" -eq 0 ]]; then
+        if [[ "${exit_code}" -eq 0 && "${summary_status}" == "passed" && "${summary_failure_class}" == "none" ]]; then
             jq -n \
                 --arg profile_id "${profile_id}" \
                 --arg run_id "${run_label}" \
@@ -220,7 +261,9 @@ run_stage_script() {
                 --arg status "passed" \
                 --arg summary_path "${summary_path}" \
                 --arg summary_status "${summary_status}" \
-                --arg repro_command "PROFILE_MODE=${profile_id} TEST_SEED=${profile_seed} RCH_BIN=${RCH_BIN} bash ${SCRIPT_DIR}/$(basename "$0")" \
+                --arg summary_failure_class "${summary_failure_class}" \
+                --arg summary_repro_command "${summary_repro_command}" \
+                --arg repro_command "$(resolved_stage_repro_command "${stage_repro_command}" "${summary_repro_command}")" \
                 '{
                     profile_id: $profile_id,
                     run_id: $run_id,
@@ -231,6 +274,8 @@ run_stage_script() {
                     status: $status,
                     summary_path: $summary_path,
                     summary_status: $summary_status,
+                    summary_failure_class: $summary_failure_class,
+                    summary_repro_command: $summary_repro_command,
                     failure_class: "none",
                     exit_code: 0,
                     log_file: "",
@@ -246,7 +291,7 @@ run_stage_script() {
     local final_started_ts
     final_started_ts="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
     local failure_class
-    failure_class="$(classify_failure "${stage_id}" "${exit_code}")"
+    failure_class="$(resolved_stage_failure_class "${stage_id}" "${exit_code}" "${summary_failure_class}")"
     jq -n \
         --arg profile_id "${profile_id}" \
         --arg run_id "${run_label}" \
@@ -257,9 +302,11 @@ run_stage_script() {
         --arg status "failed" \
         --arg summary_path "${summary_path}" \
         --arg summary_status "${summary_status}" \
+        --arg summary_failure_class "${summary_failure_class}" \
+        --arg summary_repro_command "${summary_repro_command}" \
         --arg failure_class "${failure_class}" \
         --arg log_file "${stage_log}" \
-        --arg repro_command "PROFILE_MODE=${profile_id} TEST_SEED=${profile_seed} RCH_BIN=${RCH_BIN} bash ${SCRIPT_DIR}/$(basename "$0")" \
+        --arg repro_command "$(resolved_stage_repro_command "${stage_repro_command}" "${summary_repro_command}")" \
         --argjson exit_code "${exit_code}" \
         '{
             profile_id: $profile_id,
@@ -271,6 +318,8 @@ run_stage_script() {
             status: $status,
             summary_path: $summary_path,
             summary_status: $summary_status,
+            summary_failure_class: $summary_failure_class,
+            summary_repro_command: $summary_repro_command,
             failure_class: $failure_class,
             exit_code: $exit_code,
             log_file: $log_file,
@@ -647,6 +696,18 @@ jq -n \
             profile_id,
             failure_classes,
             failed_stage_ids,
+            failed_stages: (
+                (.stages // [])
+                | map(select(.status != "passed") | {
+                    stage_id,
+                    failure_class,
+                    summary_failure_class,
+                    repro_command,
+                    summary_repro_command,
+                    summary_path,
+                    log_file
+                })
+            ),
             repro_command
         })),
         rollout_gate_status: $rollout_gate_status,

@@ -50,6 +50,22 @@ publish_artifacts() {
         && cp -a "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/." "${PUBLISHED_ARTIFACT_DIR}/"
 }
 
+rch_attempt_went_local() {
+    local attempt_log="$1"
+
+    grep -Eq '^\[RCH\] local \(|falling back to local' "${attempt_log}"
+}
+
+update_run_failure_class() {
+    local observed_failure_class="$1"
+
+    if [[ "${RUN_FAILURE_CLASS}" == "rch_local_fallback" || "${observed_failure_class}" == "rch_local_fallback" ]]; then
+        RUN_FAILURE_CLASS="rch_local_fallback"
+    elif [[ -n "${observed_failure_class}" && "${observed_failure_class}" != "none" ]]; then
+        RUN_FAILURE_CLASS="${observed_failure_class}"
+    fi
+}
+
 write_summary() {
     local destination="$1"
     local artifact_path="$2"
@@ -113,6 +129,7 @@ echo ""
 EXIT_CODE=0
 CHECK_FAILURES=0
 CHECKS_PASSED=0
+RUN_FAILURE_CLASS="none"
 
 run_suite_call() {
     local run_label="$1"
@@ -123,6 +140,7 @@ run_suite_call() {
     local attempt_log=""
     local running_count=""
     local passed_count=""
+    local last_failure_reason="test_or_pattern_failure"
 
     for ((attempt = 1; attempt <= RCH_RETRY_ATTEMPTS; attempt++)); do
         ensure_artifact_dirs
@@ -139,6 +157,12 @@ run_suite_call() {
             rc=$?
         fi
 
+        if rch_attempt_went_local "${attempt_log}"; then
+            rc=86
+            last_failure_reason="rch_local_fallback"
+            echo "  WARN: ${run_label} attempt ${attempt}/${RCH_RETRY_ATTEMPTS} fell back to local cargo; rejecting attempt"
+        fi
+
         running_count="$(
             grep -Eo 'running [0-9]+ tests' "${attempt_log}" \
                 | tail -n1 \
@@ -180,6 +204,7 @@ run_suite_call() {
     if [[ -n "${attempt_log}" && -f "${attempt_log}" ]]; then
         cp "${attempt_log}" "${run_log}"
     fi
+    update_run_failure_class "${last_failure_reason}"
     echo "  ERROR: ${run_label} failed after ${RCH_RETRY_ATTEMPTS} attempts (see ${run_log})"
     return 1
 }
@@ -190,8 +215,10 @@ if ! run_suite_call "suite run 1" "${RUN1_LOG}" "${RUN1_JSON}" "run1"; then
 fi
 
 if [[ "${DOCTOR_FULLSTACK_SINGLE_RUN}" == "1" ]]; then
-    cp "${RUN1_LOG}" "${RUN2_LOG}"
-    cp "${RUN1_JSON}" "${RUN2_JSON}"
+    if [[ ${EXIT_CODE} -eq 0 ]]; then
+        cp "${RUN1_LOG}" "${RUN2_LOG}"
+        cp "${RUN1_JSON}" "${RUN2_JSON}"
+    fi
 else
     echo ">>> [2/4] Running orchestration suite (run 2) via rch..."
     if ! run_suite_call "suite run 2" "${RUN2_LOG}" "${RUN2_JSON}" "run2"; then
@@ -235,6 +262,8 @@ FAILURE_CLASS="test_or_pattern_failure"
 if [[ ${EXIT_CODE} -eq 0 && ${CHECK_FAILURES} -eq 0 ]]; then
     SUITE_STATUS="passed"
     FAILURE_CLASS="none"
+elif [[ "${RUN_FAILURE_CLASS}" == "rch_local_fallback" ]]; then
+    FAILURE_CLASS="rch_local_fallback"
 fi
 
 TESTS_PASSED=0
